workloads.description: One restored project window and one idle terminal with an already-running broker.
One project window and one continuously streaming terminal with an already-running broker.
Three restored project windows with an already-running broker.
One restored project window and one idle terminal after the app starts a fresh broker.

countingPolicy: Measure each app root and its complete descendant process tree, then add the detached broker and control-plane PIDs explicitly. Use the top-level total footprint from one footprint invocation so Electron and native share one metric family and shared regions are handled consistently.
